traits.summary: You can see in dim light and darkness out to 60 feet.
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.summary: Advantage on saves against Charmed and immunity to magical sleep.
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and magic can't put you to sleep.
You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.summary: A 4-hour trance provides the benefits of a Long Rest.
traits.description: You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trance-like meditation.

traits.summary: You can Hide when lightly obscured by natural phenomena.
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when you are only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, or other natural phenomena.

flavorText: This entry represents the Wood Elf lineage of the broader Elf species in 2024 rules. Wood elves favor close bonds with forests and natural cycles, and their movement is swift and quiet. Many become scouts, wardens, or travelers guided by the living world.
roleplayNotes: Lean into a nature-shaped worldview: seasonal rituals, ancestral groves, and protective stewardship.
